subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Render thanks unto God that throughout thy life thou hast been a wayfarer on the path of salvation and engaged in service to thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء حمد کن خدا را که تمام حیات سالک سبیل نجاتی و مشغول بخدمت رب
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement
